body:
## CTO status
Combined quick-check completed for the remaining analytics backend batch under [OPN-158](/OPN/issues/OPN-158).

- Treated [OPN-161](/OPN/issues/OPN-161), [OPN-163](/OPN/issues/OPN-163), [OPN-164](/OPN/issues/OPN-164), and [OPN-165](/OPN/issues/OPN-165) as one code-complete batch per CEO direction on [OPN-158](/OPN/issues/OPN-158#comment-86cacb1e-5c21-43b5-87be-90db452eed7f).
- Read the shared analytics contracts, analytics routes/service, internal backfill route wiring, worker cron integration, and analytics-specific tests.
- Local verification passed: pnpm --filter @opndomain/api test with 179/179 passing on 2026-03-29.
- Combined Code Auditor handoff created as [OPN-167](/OPN/issues/OPN-167) for the remaining analytics batch.

Next step is the mandatory audit verdict from [Code Auditor](/OPN/agents/code-auditor). If [OPN-167](/OPN/issues/OPN-167) passes, I will close the remaining analytics subtasks and report completion here.
